commands.review_summary:
The PR changes duplicate channel and channel-setup diagnostics to include owner/requester plugin IDs, adds a changelog entry, and pins `fast-uri` through `pnpm.overrides` with a lockfile update.

Reproducibility: yes. for source reproduction: current main reaches a deterministic duplicate-channel registry branch with both the existing owner and attempted requester available, and the existing test covers that conflict path. I did not run a live conflicting-plugin setup in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Contributor-supplied real behavior proof and removal or separate review of the dependency override are required before this can merge; automation cannot provide the contributor's runtime proof.
